title: Stealth field enhancer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Stealth_Field_Enhancer.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Bao-Dur]] wearing a stealth field enhancer]]
A '''stealth field enhancer''' was a type of visor that was capable of increasing the wearer's perception while utilizing a [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth field generator]], enhancing the power of such units by allowing for increased monitoring of the status of the field in relation to the wearer's surroundings. Such items were rare and expensive.

==Behind the scenes==
The stealth field enhancer was intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but it was removed from the final version of the game. As the item was still present in the game files, it could be obtained using cheat codes.<ref name="KotOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
